reviews.review_description: I got to be in lemo with one the world's most overrated people. Remake this with Robocop ( who is also from Detroit) and I might be interested.
It's half about Eminem and half about Detroit. Well directed and more than just an interview in VR
Wish we would see more interviews done this way. Short, but cool to see him up close like this. VR was really made for stuff like this.

reviews.review_title: Insane Felix and paul you did it again
reviews.review_description:
Exactly what VR should be 
Download the 4gig file
Please make more experiences like this.

VR is pure emotion, it's magic, it's an incredible technology to "live" wonderful experiences.

You are in the car with the legend Eminem in his Detroit and it's crazy even if today the virtual reality has many limits for the image. I can not wait for the HMD to have a 180-fov curved Oled, a resolution of the human eye and a 6dof video in perfect scale without distortion. How much is still missing for this future?

Thanks Felix & Paul Studios
Thanks Oculus.
Thanks Eminem.
Thanks to all those who believe and support VR.

reviews.review_title: Really cool for a free experince
reviews.review_description: I would recommend this for any hip hop fan or Stan out there. Was really cool

Forget the subject matter: we can't all be hip-hop fans (I'm far to old to care). This is an astounding work of art, a true snapshot of the power of VR and what it's capable of. Total immersion and a feeling of being there, the like of which is seldom achieved.  A big shout out to Felix and Paul Studios for another ground breaking story. You really are the masters of your craft.

What an experience ! Driving around Detroit in the back of a limo with Eminem was fun.The true worth of this was always lurking in the shadows the run down city,the tramp,burning braziers,kids finding time to dance.All shot in stunning quality and fabulously directed .You can't come away unmoved an emotional rollercoaster Thank You Everyone who had a hand in this I went to Detroit and left with my head spinning .

I want to see more of these up and close personal interviews literally. I felt like I was there! And than when I saw how cold it was with the people in their winter attire doing free style rap I was glad I was there in spirit but my physical body in 70 plus degrees Los Angeles. Such an amazing experience!! Thank you creative entertainment music people for putting this all together.

reviews.review_title: This is my favorite of every experience
reviews.review_description: This is amazing. Sitting in a limo next to Eminem, experiencing the great city of Detroit. All of it is outstanding. I wish you would do more like this, this is how VR should be done and the creators got it right

Gives great insight into Eminem, where he's come from, what he thinks now, and where he's going.  You really do feel like you are in the Limo with Sway sitting next to you interviewing Slim.  The shots and scenes from Detroit are incredible and fit perfectly in with Eminem's interview. The only disappointment is the transitions.  One second you're on top of the limo looking at Detroit, next you're jerked back into the interview in the limo or forced to sit through a painfully long fade to black transition.  Wish it had been smoother but definitely worth buying and downloading the 3.9gb on my occulus go.
Learned a few things about Detroit and the vr experience of riding in a limo with M is cool.
